description_long: This is a modern, light wood-finished desk with a unique asymmetrical design. On one side, it features three open, rounded shelves supported by vertical dividers and a small wheel for mobility. The opposite side has a set of three drawers with curved metal handles, providing enclosed storage. The desktop surface is spacious and has a gentle curve, offering ergonomic comfort and visual interest. The central section includes a pull-out keyboard tray, making it suitable for office or study use. The materials and construction suggest it is both functional and aesthetically pleasing for urban interiors such as offices, studios, or reception areas.
description: A light wood desk with three open rounded shelves, three drawers with metal handles, and a pull-out keyboard tray. The design is modern and functional, suitable for urban office or study spaces.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the open shelves on the right and a solid panel on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the three rounded open shelves and the wheel at the base.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the three drawers with handles, the pull-out keyboard tray, and the open shelves.
description_view_3: Side view showing the solid panel and the curved desktop edge.
